verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I have heard but now I see, God's promise to you and me. All these years through thick and thin, We have laboured to enter in. Then God's silence was Broken through And I can see me and you. Then God's silence was Broken through And I can see me and you.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Singing Victory, Victory and Glory for all eternity, It's the promise of God to us. Victory and Glory, for all eternity, Hallelujah! Victory and Glory, for all eternity, We'll sing it forever, Victory and Glory, for all eternity,

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: The Thunders came, the Seals revealed, Couldn't understand all, but yet we believe. Many thought that we were off on a limb; They didn't know that we were worshipping Him. Then God's silence was Broken through And I can see me and you. Then God's silence was Broken through And I can see me and you.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Now we are climbing higher each day, Conquering all devils who stand in our way, This Bride is ready to make her stand For the kingdom of God is at hand, For it becometh unto us to fulfill all righteousness. For it becometh unto us to fulfill all righteousness.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: This Bride's revival is here to stay, We must press harder to keep it that way. Through prayer, obedience and sincerity, We'll all inherit eternity; JVHU, I Jesus, is here to prove that this Bride won't fail. JVHU, I Jesus, is here to prove that this Bride won't fail.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Cantando victoria Victoria y gloria por la eternidad Es la promesa de Dios un suyo Victoria y gloria por la eternidad Alleluya! Victoria y gloria por la eternidad Cantaremos por siempre Victoria y gloria por la eternidad
